creator: kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
text:
(1) pkg_create.1 has a word "hte" instead of "the".
(2) pkg_add.1 : In section "flag -t", a line ".Pa /tmp" should be ".Pa /var/tmp".
(3) pkg_delete.1 has a line ".I DEINSTALL" but this should be ".Ar DEINSTALL", isn't it?
(4) pkg_info.1 has a word "catagory" instead of "category".

Fix: 

see above.
How-To-Repeat: see /usr/share/man/man1/pkg_*.1
